case_title: PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. VERONICA GONZALEZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GONZALEZ, VERONICA $1,353.00 PRINCIPAL, $236.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,589.00, SEE SCANNED DOC
